nasb.text: Then Abdon the son of Hillel the Pirathonite died and was buried at Pirathon in the land of Ephraim, in the hill country of the Amalekites.

esv.text: Then Abdon the son of Hillel the Pirathonite died and was buried at Pirathon in the land of Ephraim, in the hill country of the Amalekites.

cnv.text: 比拉頓人希列的兒子押頓死了，埋葬在以法蓮地，就是在亞瑪力人的山地。

ccb.text: 死后葬在以法莲的比拉顿，在亚玛力人的山区。
